message:
refactor: Split cli.zig into modular components

Break down 2262-line cli.zig into focused modules:
- cli/common.zig: ANSI colors, print helpers
- cli/pkg_commands.zig: Package management (install, uninstall, etc.)
- cli/profile_commands.zig: Profiling commands
- cli/server_commands.zig: WasmEdge server
- cli/build_commands.zig: Build commands
- cli/test_commands.zig: Test runner
- cli/python_compat.zig: Python-compatible flags (-c, -m, etc.)
